title: Update company name, phone number, and location across the site

requirements.summary: Update all instances of the company name to 'Insight Research and Communications', phone number to '+91 9353172674', and location/address to 'Bangalore, India 560001' across every page, section, component, and metadata where company information appears
acceptanceCriteria: The company name 'Insight Research and Communications' appears in the Navigation/header logo or brand text.
The company name 'Insight Research and Communications' appears in the Footer.
The phone number '+91 9353172674' is displayed on the Contact page and in the Footer.
The address 'Bangalore, India 560001' is displayed on the Contact page and in the Footer.
No outdated placeholder company name (e.g., 'InsightPro') remains anywhere on the site.
All other content and styling remain unchanged.

file_operations.description: Replace the company brand name in the navigation header with 'Insight Research and Communications'. Update any logo text or brand display to show the new company name.

Replace the company name (currently 'InsightPro') with 'Insight Research and Communications'. Update the phone number to '+91 9353172674' and the address/location to 'Bangalore, India 560001' in the contact information section of the footer.

Update the company contact information section to display phone number '+91 9353172674' and address 'Bangalore, India 560001'. Ensure the company name 'Insight Research and Communications' is referenced if displayed on this page.
Update the <title> tag and any meta tags that reference the company name to 'Insight Research and Communications' to ensure proper metadata and browser tab title.
